subject: Statistics
title: The Alternative Hypothesis
description: A quick win: understand The Alternative Hypothesis.

hook.text: A drug company believes their pill reduces blood pressure. That's the alternative hypothesis — the claim to test.

buildup.text: The alternative is what you suspect is true. It's the exciting possibility that something real is going on.

discovery.text: One-sided alternatives predict a direction: 'the drug lowers pressure.' Two-sided: 'the drug changes pressure.'

twist.text: Fisher picked 0.05 arbitrarily. Yet it became a sacred threshold that entire careers hinge on.

climax.text: Science advances by elimination, not confirmation. You rule out the boring to reveal the interesting.

punchline.text: You don't prove the alternative. You disprove the null.

quiz.question: How does a hypothesis test evaluate the alternative hypothesis?
options: Indirectly — by checking if the null hypothesis is unlikely enough to reject
By directly calculating the probability the alternative is true
By comparing the alternative to all other possibilities
